name: create_harness
description: Create and run a sub-harness (multi-agent session). The sub-harness runs to completion, then returns results to the current session. Use return_mode to control how much information comes back: 'last' for just the final message, 'all' for the entire conversation.

harness_dir.description: Path to the harness template directory (e.g. 'harness/turn_based')

agents.description: Agent specs as comma-separated 'slot:identity_path' pairs (e.g. '正方:identity/id1,反方:identity/id1,裁判:identity/dante')

prompts.description: Optional prompts to override defaults. Use '|' to separate multiple prompts. Format: 'name:value|name:value' (e.g. 'task:辩题内容...|debater:自定义辩手规则')

workspace.description: Optional workspace directory path for the harness

inherit_conversation.description: If true, the sub-harness session starts with a copy of the current conversation history. Default false.

return_mode.description: Controls what results come back: 'all' returns entire sub-session conversation, 'last' returns only the final non-tool message. If not specified, uses the harness config default.
